templates.purpose: Capture directional follow-through after structural breakout with participation confirmation.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when price closes beyond breakout threshold and volume expansion filter passes.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Scale out at target ladder or momentum decay signal.
templates.stop_logic_structure: ATR-normalized stop below breakout retest level.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Conviction-weighted size with regime multiplier and liquidity cap.

templates.purpose: Trade second-leg continuation after successful breakout retest.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on retest hold above breakout pivot with resumed momentum.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on failed retest or trailing stop trigger.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop below retest low plus volatility buffer.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Reduce size if breakout occurred in high spread conditions.

templates.purpose: Re-enter prevailing trend after controlled pullback.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when pullback depth remains within configured ATR band and trend filter remains valid.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at prior swing extension or trend invalidation.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Hard stop below pullback structure break.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Increase size only when breadth and relative strength align.

templates.purpose: Capture trend resumption after short-term mean reversion inside trend.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when short-term reversion indicator resets while higher timeframe trend stays intact.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on momentum divergence or time stop.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop at pullback low with adaptive volatility buffer.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use smaller size in mature trends with high trend age.

templates.purpose: Capture acceleration phase when trend transitions from orderly to impulsive.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on acceleration threshold breach with confirming range expansion.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when acceleration decelerates below threshold.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Size down in high turnover contexts.

templates.purpose: Trade continuation after acceleration survives first pullback.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on first higher-low after acceleration spike.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on failed higher-low or weakening thrust.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use cap on notional concentration per theme.

templates.purpose: Fade statistically extreme percentile moves in balanced regimes.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when percentile extreme and z-score trigger jointly fire.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at mean reversion target or timeout.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop beyond extension threshold in continuation direction.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use smaller size for counter-trend entries.

templates.purpose: Capture partial mean reversion from tail percentile events.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter after extreme candle closes and next-bar failure to continue.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on VWAP touch or predefined partial target.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Block setup under high spread stress.

templates.purpose: Buy post-capitulation rebounds after downside exhaustion.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when downside extension and liquidation pressure peak then fade.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on first resistance touch or failed bounce structure.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Allow reduced-size pilot then add on confirmation.

templates.purpose: Capture short-cover bounce when trend continuation fails at lows.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on failed low break with positive delta divergence.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on bounce exhaustion or time stop.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Limit gross exposure during risk-off sessions.

templates.purpose: Fade overextended upside moves lacking broad confirmation.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter short when extension threshold and divergence filter pass.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at reversion objective or volatility reset.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Keep size small in strong uptrend regimes.

templates.purpose: Exploit failed continuation after parabolic intraday advance.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on first lower-high after parabolic run.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on VWAP or prior balance zone revisit.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Require strong liquidity and spread constraints.

templates.purpose: Long top-ranked leaders in persistent leadership environments.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Select top rank bucket and enter on pullback or breakout trigger.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on rank decay below threshold.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Allocate by rank score with turnover penalty.

templates.purpose: Capture leadership persistence in sector rotation cycles.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Rotate into top sector leaders with breadth confirmation.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on sector momentum breakdown.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Sector caps to avoid concentration.

templates.purpose: Trade relative spread between leaders and laggards.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter spread when rank dispersion exceeds threshold.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when spread converges to target band.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop on spread expansion beyond risk budget.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Dollar-neutral sizing with beta adjustment.

templates.purpose: Capture laggard catch-up during recovery phases.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Long laggards/short leaders when recovery breadth expands sharply.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit as catch-up spread normalizes.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Reduce size if correlation regime spikes.

templates.purpose: Exploit breakout after prolonged volatility contraction.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on close outside compression band with directional filter.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on failed expansion or target hit.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Scale by compression duration and liquidity.

templates.purpose: Trade post-event breakout from implied-vol crush setup.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when post-event range narrows then breaks with volume confirmation.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when expansion velocity drops below threshold.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Cap position under event risk windows.

templates.purpose: Fade failed breakout attempts and trapped-flow unwinds.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter opposite direction after breakout fails to hold confirmation window.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit into prior value area or VWAP.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Require liquidity filter and avoid news spikes.

templates.purpose: Capture breakdown failure rebound with trap confirmation.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter long on failed breakdown and immediate reclaim.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at midpoint or upper range boundary.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Prioritize A-quality only under stressed volatility.

templates.purpose: Fade mature trends after acceleration exhaustion.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter against trend when exhaustion score and divergence both trigger.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on first mean reversion target zone.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Hard size cap due counter-trend risk.

templates.purpose: Capture reversal after failed final thrust in mature trends.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter after final thrust fails and structure breaks lower/higher.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on first structural retrace completion.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use only in high-quality liquidity names.

templates.purpose: Trade normalization of extreme perpetual funding imbalances.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter against crowded side when funding z-score exceeds trigger.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when funding normalizes or trend invalidates.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop on continuation with rising open interest.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Reduce size in illiquid alt contracts.

templates.purpose: Capture short squeeze after deeply negative funding regime.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter long when negative funding and short crowding begin to unwind.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at carry-neutral or momentum stall.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop if funding remains extreme and price weakens.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use progressive sizing with confirmation add-ons.

templates.purpose: Exploit futures basis normalization after dislocation.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when annualized basis deviates beyond historical bounds.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit as basis reverts toward carry equilibrium.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop if basis divergence expands further with confirming flow.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Notional scaled by basis distance and liquidity.

templates.purpose: Capture basis expansion continuation in strong risk-on cycles.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter with basis trend when carry remains supportive and stress low.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on carry deterioration or volatility shock.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop if basis trend breaks below regime floor.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use capped leverage and venue liquidity checks.

templates.purpose: Trade mean reversion after short-lived liquidity dislocation.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter once spread shock peaks and first stabilization signal appears.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on return to normal microstructure regime.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use strict max size and skip unavailable data windows.

templates.purpose: Capture bounce after forced-flow liquidation wave.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter after liquidation cluster dissipates and price reclaims micro support.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on first resistance retest.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Allow only when execution quality score is acceptable.

templates.purpose: Exploit sustained multi-session trend persistence.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on higher timeframe breakout with supportive daily trend score.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on daily trend break or momentum decay.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use slower rebalance cadence to reduce turnover.

templates.purpose: Add exposure on orderly pullbacks during multi-day trend.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter on daily pullback support hold with intact trend structure.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on support break or relative-strength decay.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Scale entries across two tranches to reduce timing risk.

templates.purpose: Fade mature multi-day runs after broad divergence appears.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter opposite direction after trend extension and breadth divergence trigger.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at first multi-day reversion objective.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use half-size unless regime transition confirmation appears.

templates.purpose: Capture reversal after failed continuation day in mature trend.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter after failed continuation candle closes back inside prior value zone.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on swing mean reversion completion.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Require elevated liquidity and low data-latency confidence.
